expectations.text: Document header contains the exact Spec ID CUST-O2C-03
Script type is identified as Client Script
expectations.evidence: Type field: 'Client Script'. Deployment info also confirms ClientScript type.

expectations.text: Trigger is fieldChanged or sublistChanged on the Sales Order item sublist
expectations.evidence: Uses fieldChanged and pageInit. Scope: 'Any change to the item field or quantity field within the Items sublist.' fieldChanged targets the item sublist.

expectations.text: The source field custitem_lead_time_days is explicitly referenced in the affected fields table or pseudocode
expectations.evidence: Fields table: 'Lead Time (Days), custitem_lead_time_days, Integer'. Referenced in pseudocode as the sublist field being read.

expectations.text: Business logic section contains pseudocode that iterates lines and selects the maximum lead time value
expectations.evidence: Pseudocode: 'IF leadTimeDays > maxLeadTime THEN maxLeadTime = leadTimeDays' inside a FOR loop over all lines.

expectations.text: Edge cases section addresses null lead time, single line scenario, and line removal
expectations.evidence: 10 edge cases. EC-01: blank custitem_lead_time_days. EC-04: single line item. EC-05: line deleted, reducing maximum lead time.

expectations.text: Testing section contains at least 3 test cases with specific input data and expected results
expectations.evidence: 11 test cases with specific inputs and expected results.
